parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "title": "Voice Message: {{ JSON.parse($('Azure OpenAI: Summarize Voice').item.json.choices[0].message.content).subject || 'Eingehende Voice Message' }}",
  "group": "Support",
  "customer": "{{ $('Validate File').item.json.fromEmail || 'unknown@customer.com' }}",
  "state": "new",
  "priority": "2 normal",
  "note": "📞 Voice Message empfangen\n\n**Transkript:**\n{{ $('Extract Transcript').item.json.transcript }}\n\n**KI-Zusammenfassung:**\n{{ $('Azure OpenAI: Summarize Voice').item.json.choices[0].message.content }}"
}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO voice_message (zammad_ticket_id, storage_url, blob_name, original_filename, mime_type, file_size_bytes, transcript, transcript_confidence, stt_provider, stt_processed_at, ai_summary)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, 'azure_speech', NOW(), $9)
RETURNING id
parameters.queryParams: ={{ $('Zammad: Create Ticket').item.json.id }},={{ $env.BLOB_STORAGE_URL + '/voice-audio/' + $('Validate File').item.json.blobName }},={{ $('Validate File').item.json.blobName }},={{ $('Validate File').item.json.originalFilename }},={{ $('Validate File').item.json.mimeType }},={{ $('Validate File').item.json.fileSizeBytes }},={{ $('Extract Transcript').item.json.transcript }},={{ $('Extract Transcript').item.json.confidence }},={{ $('Azure OpenAI: Summarize Voice').item.json.choices[0].message.content }}
